headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Charles River Laboratories Stock?
summary: Charles River Laboratories has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past 52 weeks, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a highly optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
